PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-13-2006 Continued To Mar-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Danny Haukedalen appearing for and with petitioner Naomi Cogliandro. Donald Friedman appearing for and with the beneficiary children. The personal property issue is not resolved. Mr. Friedman wants an evidentiary hearing on the personal property issue and on his objection to the administrator's creditor's claim. Mr. Haukedalen argued that they are separate issues. He asked for a ruling on the Spousal Property Petition. Court is not making a ruling on the Spousal Property Petition today. Matter is continued to 3/6/07 for status. Hearing on the creditor's claim issue on calendar 1/3/07 is also continued to 3/6/07. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY

MINI MINUTES: Danny Haukedalen appearing for and with Naomi Cogliandro. Donald Friedman appearing for and with Jennifer Cogliandro, beneficiary and objector. The issues are the tangible personal property and the 46th Avenue property. Mediation was unsuccessful. The objector is objecting to Mrs. Cogliandro filing a claim against the Russian River property. Matter is continued to 12/13 for status. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
